query:
-- Insert sample videos for Vibe feed
INSERT INTO videos (id, userId, title, description, videoUrl, thumbnailUrl, aiModel, prompt, likes, views, comments, visibility, createdAt) VALUES
('vid_1', 'user_1', 'AI Music Video', 'Neon synthwave music video generated with Sora', 'https://example.com/video1.mp4', 'https://example.com/thumb1.jpg', 'sora', 'Neon synthwave music video with glowing effects', 8400, 8400, 3000, 'public', NOW()),
('vid_2', 'user_2', 'Face Clone Collab', 'My face cloned into a music video collaboration', 'https://example.com/video2.mp4', 'https://example.com/thumb2.jpg', 'heygen', 'Face clone in music video', 5200, 5200, 2000, 'public', NOW()),
('vid_3', 'user_3', 'Sora Generated', 'Epic cinematic video generated with Sora API', 'https://example.com/video3.mp4', 'https://example.com/thumb3.jpg', 'sora', 'Epic cinematic battle scene with dragons', 12100, 12100, 6000, 'public', NOW()),
('vid_4', 'user_4', 'Beat Studio Creation', 'Music production video with AI beats', 'https://example.com/video4.mp4', 'https://example.com/thumb4.jpg', 'sora', 'Music production studio with AI-generated beats', 7800, 7800, 4200, 'public', NOW()),
('vid_5', 'user_5', 'Dance Challenge', 'AI-generated dance choreography video', 'https://example.com/video5.mp4', 'https://example.com/thumb5.jpg', 'sora', 'Trending dance choreography with neon effects', 9500, 9500, 5100, 'public', NOW());

-- Insert sample users for the videos
INSERT INTO users (id, username, email, displayName, bio, avatarUrl, createdAt) VALUES
('user_1', 'neonvex', 'neonvex@example.com', '@NeonVex', 'AI Music Video Creator', 'https://example.com/avatar1.jpg', NOW()),
('user_2', 'cosmicvibe', 'cosmicvibe@example.com', '@CosmicVibe', 'Face Clone Enthusiast', 'https://example.com/avatar2.jpg', NOW()),
('user_3', 'glitchqueen', 'glitchqueen@example.com', '@GlitchQueen', 'Sora Generated Content', 'https://example.com/avatar3.jpg', NOW()),
('user_4', 'beatstudio', 'beatstudio@example.com', '@BeatStudio', 'Music Producer', 'https://example.com/avatar4.jpg', NOW()),
('user_5', 'dancechallenge', 'dancechallenge@example.com', '@DanceChallenge', 'Dance & AI Creator', 'https://example.com/avatar5.jpg', NOW())
ON CONFLICT DO NOTHING;
